---
description: Update documentation and knowledge base after code changes
argument-hint: "Provide the changes summary and affected file paths"
---

# Knowledge Update

Update documentation to reflect recent code changes.

## Changes Summary

${input:changes_summary}

## Affected Files

${input:affected_files}

## Instructions

1. Identify which documentation files are affected by the code changes.
2. Update affected docs to reflect the new behavior, APIs, or configuration.
3. Verify that commands and examples in documentation still work.
4. If the main README is affected, describe the drift and propose an update — do NOT modify it without human approval.
5. Flag any documentation gaps that should be addressed in a follow-up.
